description: Verify architecture response covers all 6 required sections

messages.content: Design a rate limiter for a public REST API. The API serves 10,000 requests per second at peak. The rate limiter must be distributed and survive the failure of any single node.

expected_behaviours: Covers: Requirements, Constraints, Components, Interfaces, Failure Modes, Trade-offs
Names specific algorithms (token bucket, sliding window, etc.)
